expected_intents: complete a purchase as a guest (no account)
complete a purchase while logged in
apply and remove a discount / coupon code
change quantity or remove an item mid-checkout
recover from a declined or failed payment
update or switch the saved payment method
cancel or request a refund on an order after purchase
receive and re-request an order confirmation / receipt
critical_paths: add to cart -> checkout -> pay -> order persisted -> confirmation
payment failure -> recoverable error -> retry without losing cart
common_failure_modes: success screen shown even though the server call failed (silent payment failure)
invalid coupon silently ignored with no message
cart or address state lost on reload or browser-back
empty-cart checkout spins or dead-ends with no end state
price/total mismatch between cart, checkout, and confirmation
often_missing_paths: edit a shipping address after ordering
guest order lookup without an account
evidence_cautions: do not submit real payments; blocked -> evidence debt
do not trigger real confirmation emails; avoided -> evidence debt
